ddls:
CREATE TABLE "passengers" (
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each passenger */,
  "sib_sp" INTEGER /* Number of siblings/spouses aboard */,
  "par_ch" INTEGER /* Number of parents/children aboard */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the passenger */,
  "sex" INTEGER /* Sex of the passenger (0 = male, 1 = female) */,
  "fare" INTEGER /* Fare paid by the passenger */,
  "class" INTEGER /* Class of travel (1 = 1st, 2 = 2nd, 3 = 3rd) */,
  "survived" INTEGER /* Survival status (0 = deceased, 1 = survived) */,
  "embarked" TEXT /* Port of embarkation */,
  "ticket_number" TEXT /* Unique ticket number for each passenger */,
  "cabin" TEXT /* Cabin number or letter */,
  "lifeboat" TEXT /* Lifeboat number if the passenger survived */,
  "body_number" TEXT /* Body number if the passenger did not survive */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the passenger */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the passenger */,
  "social_status" TEXT /* Social status or title */,
  "emergency_response" TEXT /* Details of the emergency response */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("passenger_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_passengers_fare FOREIGN KEY ("fare") REFERENCES fares ("fare_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_passengers_sex FOREIGN KEY ("sex") REFERENCES sexes ("sex_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_passengers_age FOREIGN KEY ("age") REFERENCES ages ("age_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_passengers_class FOREIGN KEY ("class") REFERENCES classes ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "voyages" (
  "voyage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each voyage */,
  "voyage_name" TEXT /* Name of the voyage */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the voyage */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the voyage */,
  "ship_name" TEXT /* Name of the ship */,
  "route" TEXT /* Route of the voyage */,
  "total_passengers" INTEGER /* Total number of passengers on the voyage */,
  "total_crew" INTEGER /* Total number of crew members on the voyage */,
  "total_survivors" INTEGER /* Total number of survivors from the voyage */,
  "total_deaths" INTEGER /* Total number of deaths from the voyage */,
  "cause_of_disaster" TEXT /* Cause of the disaster */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("voyage_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "passenger_voyages" (
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* ID of the passenger */,
  "voyage_id" INTEGER /* ID of the voyage */,
  "boarding_time" TEXT /* Time of boarding */,
  "disembarkation_time" TEXT /* Time of disembarkation */,
  "boarding_port" TEXT /* Port of boarding */,
  "disembarkation_port" TEXT /* Port of disembarkation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("passenger_id", "voyage_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "classes" (
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each class */,
  "class_name" TEXT /* Name of the class (e.g., 1st, 2nd, 3rd) */,
  "deck" TEXT /* Deck where the class is located */,
  "amenities" TEXT /* List of amenities available in the class */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fares" (
  "fare_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fare */,
  "fare_amount" REAL /* Amount of the fare */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency of the fare */,
  "discount" REAL /* Any discount applied to the fare */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., cash, credit card) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fare_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ages" (
  "age_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each age group */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Name of the age group (e.g., child, adult, senior) */,
  "age_group_description" TEXT /* Description of the age group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("age_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sexes" (
  "sex_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sex */,
  "sex_name" TEXT /* Name of the sex (e.g., male, female) */,
  "gender_pronoun" TEXT /* Preferred gender pronoun */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sex_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "survival_rates" (
  "survival_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each survival rate */,
  "factor" TEXT /* Factor affecting survival (e.g., class, age, sex) */,
  "survival_rate" REAL /* Survival rate for the given factor */,
  "sample_size" INTEGER /* Number of passengers in the sample for the rate */,
  "confidence_interval" REAL /* Confidence interval for the survival rate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("survival_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographics" (
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic entry */,
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* ID of the passenger */,
  "age_id" INTEGER /* ID of the age group */,
  "sex_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sex */,
  "marital_status" TEXT /* Marital status of the passenger */,
  "income" REAL /* Annual income of the passenger */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Education level of the passenger */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demographic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographics_sex_id FOREIGN KEY ("sex_id") REFERENCES sexes ("sex_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographics_passenger_id FOREIGN KEY ("passenger_id") REFERENCES passengers ("passenger_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographics_age_id FOREIGN KEY ("age_id") REFERENCES ages ("age_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "survival_outcomes" (
  "outcome_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each survival outcome */,
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* ID of the passenger */,
  "survived" INTEGER /* Survival status (0 = deceased, 1 = survived) */,
  "cause_of_death" TEXT /* Cause of death if the passenger did not survive */,
  "rescue_details" TEXT /* Details of the rescue if the passenger survived */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("outcome_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_survival_outcomes_passenger_id FOREIGN KEY ("passenger_id") REFERENCES passengers ("passenger_id")
)
